arabic:
وعن أبى هريرة رضى الله عنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏إذا قام أحدكم من مجلس، ثم رجع إليه، فهو أحق به‏"‏. ((رواه مسلم)).

english.narrator: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported:
english.text: Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "If someone leaves his seat (for one reason or another) and returns to it, he is better entitled to it.".

chapter.english: The Book of the Etiquette of Sleeping, Lying and Sitting etc
